description_long: This sculpture features two robed human figures standing closely together atop an ornate pedestal. The figures appear to be engaged in an intimate gesture, possibly an embrace or a conversation, with their heads inclined toward each other. The pedestal is elaborately decorated, with a plaque or inscription visible on the front, reading 'Antoni Thal 1874.' The base is robust and rectangular, with decorative reliefs and a stepped design. The entire piece is rendered in a light, stone-like material, giving it a classical and monumental appearance. The sculpture exudes a sense of historical or commemorative significance.
description: A detailed stone sculpture of two robed figures in close interaction, mounted on an ornate pedestal with an inscription. The piece is classical in style and appears commemorative.
description_view_0: Front view showing both figures' faces and the inscribed plaque on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the draped garments and the depth of the figures' forms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the figures and the reverse side of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the figures' profiles and the pedestal's side details.
attribute_subject_matter: two robed human figures in close interaction
attribute_location_context: No specific context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
